title: Participation in program; needs assessment
doc_html:
§2474.  Participation in program; needs assessment

Participation in the long term home health program shall be based initially on a comprehensive assessment conducted in accordance with rules and regulations promulgated by the department.

Added by Acts 1982, No. 715, §1.
